---
title: "Mixed Languages"
---

Introduction text.

```{python}
#| label: py-setup
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
x = range(1, 11)
```

Some explanation.

```{r}
#| label: r-plot
library(ggplot2)
df <- data.frame(x = 1:10, y = (1:10)^2)
```

More explanation.

```{python}
#| label: py-plot
y = [i**2 for i in x]
plt.plot(list(x), y)
plt.show()
```

Conclusion.
